groups_from_graph_reason: groups_from_graph() not present on this branch; using group_markets() over the full eligible catalog
bregman_zero_certified_explanation: dominant stage=validate_simplex: groups are structurally INCOMPLETE (exhaustive=False / not a provable complete set) — buying a partial set is not a guaranteed hedge, so it is correctly NOT certified (completeness is never fabricated); NOTE: 104 group(s) had POSITIVE raw projected profit (best=0.999) but were still rejected (realism=15, validate_simplex=89) — the raw mispricing is real, but the set is not a certifiable complete hedge
